# CivilizationControl — Documentation Map

> **Note to Agents:** This file serves as a high-level map to the most important documentation in this repository.
> For agent guardrails, see `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `AGENTS.md`.

## Critical Entry Points
- **Agent Rules**: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (MUST READ)
- **Agent Context**: `AGENTS.md` (MUST READ)
- **Security**: `.github/security-guidelines.md`
- **System Spec**: `docs/core/spec.md`

## Key Documentation
- **System Specification**: `docs/core/spec.md`
- **Implementation Plan**: `docs/core/civilizationcontrol-implementation-plan.md`
- **Day-1 Checklist**: `docs/core/day1-checklist.md`
- **Demo Beat Sheet**: `docs/core/civilizationcontrol-demo-beat-sheet.md`
- **Decision Log**: `docs/decision-log.md`

## Architecture
- **Gate Lifecycle**: `docs/architecture/gate-lifecycle-function-reference.md`
- **Auth Model**: `docs/architecture/world-contracts-auth-model.md`
- **Read Provider**: `docs/architecture/read-provider-abstraction.md`

## PTB Patterns
- **Library Index**: `docs/ptb/README.md`
- **Core Patterns**: `docs/ptb/ptb-patterns.md`

## Strategy & Voice
- **Voice & Narrative**: `docs/strategy/civilization-control/civilizationcontrol-voice-and-narrative.md`
- **Product Vision**: `docs/strategy/civilization-control/civilizationcontrol-product-vision.md`

## Operations
- **Gate Lifecycle Runbook**: `docs/operations/gate-lifecycle-runbook.md`
- **Decision Template**: `docs/operations/DECISIONS_TEMPLATE.md`
